services.source_quote: Specialized academic instruction (mathematics): 150 minutes per week; 30 minutes, 5 times weekly; provider: Special education teacher.

Individual counseling: 30 minutes per week; 30 minutes, 1 time weekly; provider: School counselor.

goals.text: Jamal will read grade-level text at 120 words per minute with 95% accuracy.
